description: Material Passport for Gate 1.5 — Data Quality Gate. Tracks the 9-item blocking quality gate between Stage 1 and Stage 2.

required_artifacts.name: 数据质量门闸报告
required_artifacts.description: Complete report of 9 data quality checks with pass/warn/fail status for each item.

required_artifacts.name: 数据质量指标
required_artifacts.description: Quantitative metrics: completeness rate, missing pattern summary, outlier counts, type consistency scores.

quality_gates.name: 数据完整性
quality_gates.description: All expected records present; no duplicate IDs; file integrity verified.

quality_gates.name: 变量类型一致性
quality_gates.description: Variable types match data dictionary; no unexpected type coercions.

quality_gates.name: 缺失机制评估
quality_gates.description: Missing data mechanism (MCAR/MAR/MNAR) assessed for key variables.

quality_gates.name: 异常值标记
quality_gates.description: Statistical and domain-specific outliers identified and documented.

quality_gates.name: 范围合理性
quality_gates.description: All values within plausible ranges per data dictionary and clinical knowledge.

quality_gates.name: 逻辑一致性
quality_gates.description: Cross-variable logical checks pass (e.g., death date after enrollment date).

quality_gates.name: 清洗日志完整
quality_gates.description: All data modifications documented in cleaning log with rationale.

quality_gates.name: 盲态审核完成
quality_gates.description: Blinding review completed and signed off before database lock.

quality_gates.name: 隐私合规
quality_gates.description: PHI detection completed; all sensitive fields identified and handled per policy.
